ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for managing events and inquiries */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the company */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account (hashed for security) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., employee, event manager) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., Meeting, Training) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., Wilcox, New South) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the location for events */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for booking inquiries */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of event */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week when the event occurs */,
  "place" TEXT /* Venue or location of the event */,
  "is_scheduled" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the event is scheduled (1) or not (0) */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company organizing the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event that requires the equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment (e.g., projector, microphone) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the equipment required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_equipment_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event that requires the resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource (e.g., catering, decorations) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_resources_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the user is registering for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user registering for the event */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered for the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., pending, confirmed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event related to the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., reminder, update, cancellation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the user attended */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user attending the event */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date the user attended the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event related to the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "data" TEXT /* Report data (e.g., JSON or CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event related to the payment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user writing the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_reviews_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
